title: Label non-compliant: non-approved bottle size (800 mL) (motion-blur, level 10, sideways)
image_prompt: Photorealistic frosted bottle with a crisp white label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Crestview', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '800 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Crestview Spirits, Denver, CO'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: FAIL compliance (Net contents 800 mL not approved)
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has severe motion blur from camera shake. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees). The photo is sideways and may need rotation before automated approval.
